topic.what: Blockchain-based framework covering complete onsite examination lifecycle with anonymous script evaluation and privacy-preserving result verification
topic.how: Uses four Ethereum Solidity smart contracts (RBAC, ExamLifecycle, HashRegistry, ResultAudit) with IPFS off-chain storage and commit-reveal ZKP scheme
topic.why_matters: Addresses credential forgery, result tampering, examiner bias, and lack of transparency in traditional academic examination systems prevalent in developing countries

characteristics.what_it_measures: Transactions processed per second during exam workflow
characteristics.evidence: 18,930 transactions processed in 9,555 seconds (2h 39m) on local Ganache chain
characteristics.context: Large scenario with 100 courses and 4,439 scripts

characteristics.evidence: 0 failed transactions out of 18,930 total across all scenarios
characteristics.context: Confirms correctness of smart-contract logic and automation scripts

characteristics.what_it_measures: Ethereum gas consumed for exam workflow transactions
characteristics.evidence: Workflow gas excludes deployment costs of 8,383,982 gas
characteristics.context: ResultAudit and HashRegistry contracts account for 88.2% of workflow gas

characteristics.what_it_measures: Ethereum transaction cost in USD for full exam cycle
characteristics.evidence: Calculated at 0.044 gwei gas price and ETH=$2154.93

characteristics.what_itasures: Average gas consumed per workflow transaction
characteristics.evidence: ResultAudit avg 260,173 gas/tx; HashRegistry avg 456,689 gas/tx
characteristics.context: HashRegistry higher due to IPFS hash anchoring operations

characteristics.what_it_measures: Estimated execution state written to distributed ledger
characteristics.evidence: Based on 87,172 SSTORE operations (35% of workflow gas)
characteristics.context: Storage scales near-linearly with script count

characteristics.what_it_measures: Fixed on-chain bytecode footprint of all smart contracts
characteristics.evidence: Combined size of 4 contracts; well under EIP-170 limit of 24,576 bytes

characteristics.what_it_measures: Maximum answer scripts that can be registered in large scenario
characteristics.evidence: Simulated CSE Department BUET workload across 100 courses

characteristics.what_it_measures: Growth behavior of gas consumption with increasing workload
characteristics.evidence: Sub-linear at small scales due to amortized fixed costs; near-linear at large scale per script
